pi_items.verified_value: 3 target patients (P1, P2, P3) are selected randomly and receive the diagnosis
2 control patients (C1, C2) are selected randomly and explicitly exclude the diagnosis
OpenEMR/LibreHealth 'lists' table with type='medical_problem', storing ICD-10 code in 'diagnosis' column
Ground truth stored in 3 files: expected_targets.txt (target patient names), expected_controls.txt (control patient names), target_pids.txt (target patient PIDs)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the LibreHealthIO NHANES dataset, a real (de-identified) patient dataset from the 2011-2012 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey containing approximately 9,375 patients. The test injects Chronic Fatigue Syndrome (using ICD-10 code R53.82, which is the older non-specific code; CDC recommends G93.32 since October 2022) into 3 randomly selected target patients from the database. The task verifies correct cohort identification by comparing the agent's exported CSV against ground truth files containing the actual names of 3 target patients (who should appear) and 2 control patients (who should not appear). The verifier checks that all 3 targets are included, all 2 controls are excluded, and awards partial credit based on targets found and control exclusion accuracy.
